title: bidens moorei
intro: Bidens moorei, also known as 'Ironweed', is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bidens moorei include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and is also sometimes used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
